mission.title: kubevirt: DHCP Gateway Option severely broken since 0.43
mission.description: DHCP Gateway Option severely broken since 0.43. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify kubevirt troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kubevirt deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review kubevirt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt
```
**What happened**:

In one of the commits in this range https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/compare/v0.43.0...v0.43.1-rc.1 the gateway IP address that ends up at the DHCP server was converted from a 4-byte IPv4 representation to a 16-byte IPv4-mapped IPv6 representation, breaking DHCP gateway option handling.

steps.title: Apply the fix for DHCP Gateway Option severely broken since 0.43
steps.description:
This PR fixes https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/6462, the behavior and need for the PR is extensively detailed there. The `.IPv4()` on the gateway IP can safely be done in `server.go` as it is the last place it is touched before handed over to the DHCP library.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm DHCP Gateway Option severely broken since 0.43 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt -n kubevirt --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: This PR fixes https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/6462, the behavior and need for the PR is extensively detailed there. The `.IPv4()` on the gateway IP can safely be done in `server.go` as it is the last place it is touched before handed over to the DHCP library.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
